subcodes.first_line: We departed from the House, directing Our steps toward the Garden, and on Our way encountered souls who had believed in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا خرجنا من البیت متوجها الی البستان و صادفنا فی السبیل عبادا آمنوا بالله
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @thankfulness; gratitude
